name: Chengdu Fusen Noble-House Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Fusen Noble-House Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the development, rental, and service of decorative building materials and home furnishing markets. It offers sanitary ware, such as toilet bowls, basins, bathtubs, shower rooms, sauna, bathroom cabinets, faucets, showers, hardware pendants, and accessories and drainers; hardware products, including paints, ceiling materials, wall and floor tiles, stones, central heating systems, and floor products; and doors and windows. The company also provides bedroom, living room, study, restaurant, and bathroom furniture; furniture materials; household goods, which include pillows, cleaning tools, storage boxes and bags, and drying racks and poles; kitchen and bathroom appliances comprises water heaters, cookers, disinfection cabinets, hoods, home theatres, and smart home products; and lighting fixtures consisting of ceiling, floor, wall, and table lamps, as well as down and sport lights, and chandeliers. In addition, it operates as a decorative design and decoration company. The company sells its products through malls, franchised malls, and specialty stores. Chengdu Fusen Noble-House Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Chengdu, China.
